name: Burgundy Style Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into neat, fairly large cubes and place it in a dish.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Sprinkle 1/3 of the onions and garlic over the meat, along with thyme, bay leaf, and parsley.
4. Add lemon peel and wine with about 1/4 of the oil. Marinate for at least 2 hours, turning occasionally.
5. Remove rind from bacon and dice it.
6. Heat remaining oil in a heavy pan and gently fry diced bacon until just golden.
7. Lift meat from marinade using a perforated spoon or strain liquid from meat, keeping the liquid.
8. Toss meat in flour, then fry with bacon and onions for several minutes.
9. Strain wine marinade into the pan, stirring to blend. Add beef stock with additional salt and pepper; bring to a boil.
10. Lower heat and cover pan tightly. Simmer gently for 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours until meat is very tender, adding mushrooms in the last 5-10 minutes.
